Class WorkoutRoutineDAO

java.lang.Object
com.lockedin.lockedin.model.dao.WorkoutRoutineDAO
public class WorkoutRoutineDAO extends Object
Data access object for workout routine records.
Version:
1.0
Author:
LockedIn Team

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedSetData
    Provides completed set data functionality for LockedIn.
    static class 
    WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedWorkoutData
    Provides completed workout data functionality for LockedIn.
    static class 
    WorkoutRoutineDAO.RoutineData
    Provides routine data functionality for LockedIn.
